label: About
title: About Torn Digital Bouquet
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 71 recent saved-signal files and 76 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around digibouquet and peony flower, plus 7 more. A source image from assets.pauwee.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Torn Digital Bouquet: Fashion/material macro, shallow macro plate grammar: one oversized bouquet-like rupture is cropped tight against a mostly open field, using the reference’s stark edge darkness only as peripheral negative space. The main surface is bright synthetic petal, perforated stamp paper, vellum, and glossy browser glass; a di... After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against large circular gridded red-pink aperture at upper left, broad translucent pink peony fold across lower center, and narrow black ink cut on diagonal clear ribbon.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
